corpus.split_rule: case IDs are opaque and assigned by SHA-256 rank within family before labels are attached; no paraphrase, alias family, migrated descendant, or shared template crosses a split
corpus.held_out_access: labels and aggregate outcomes remain sealed until implementation, baselines, ablations, evaluator, budgets, and freeze validator pass at one commit

decision_rules.advantage_gate: No advantage claim unless QCSA is Pareto-nondominated against every matched baseline in at least three families and aggregate task-decision accuracy improves by at least 0.03 in every seed without increasing unsafe authority release.
decision_rules.resource_gate: A quality gain qualifies only at no more than 1.25 times matched total operation count, or a governance-failure prevention gain of at least 0.10 absolute qualifies at no more than 1.50 times matched total operation count; report latency and burden separately.
decision_rules.calibration_gate: Brier score and selective risk must not worsen by more than 0.01 absolute in aggregate; all family-level regressions remain visible.
decision_rules.semantic_preservation_gate: No preservation claim from the candidate generator and its paired validator alone; the independent evaluator must agree and disagreement must remain below 0.05 aggregate without hiding family failures.
decision_rules.authority_gate: Any semantic alias or address that widens authority, or any attempted effect lacking an independent authority decision and receipt, fails the authority lane regardless of aggregate quality.
decision_rules.migration_gate: Every compatible old address resolves to the same SOID; every incompatible, merge, or split case fails explicitly or carries typed lineage; any silent retarget blocks promotion.
decision_rules.narrowing_gate: Narrow or reject a lane when its overhead yields neither a task-decision improvement nor a prevented governance or migration failure under the frozen frontier.
decision_rules.statistics: Report exact counts and seed-level values, paired bootstrap 95 percent intervals with 10000 deterministic resamples for accuracy deltas, and no blended scalar score.

implementation_checks: negative controls for every required adversarial family
non_claims: This plan preregisters a bounded synthetic and public-safe evaluation; it is not an open-world benchmark.
A favorable local result would not establish production safety, privacy, universal grounding, or external transfer.
The exact thresholds govern reached non-core claims and do not automatically promote chapter-core claims.
No external humans are recruited; clarification and approval burden are deterministic proxies.
